style_violation_details.message: Move parameterized/constant part-selects out of always_* into continuous assign/helper wires.

policy: returncode==0, no error/fatal/warning/sorry diagnostics, no procedural parameterized part-select style violations, and no generated-RTL policy violations: .sv filenames with SystemVerilog logic-port syntax, rtl/<ip>_param.vh for shared parameters, no package/import/interface/modport/function/task/for/while, and no typedef/enum/always_ff/always_comb
